summary: Tested GPS tracking features, login flows, and location data processing. All backend API tests (14) and frontend E2E tests (12) passed. GPS tracking hook correctly handles both Transistorsoft direct format and standard coords nested format.
seed_data_creation: Test trips created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All GPS tracking features tested and working: 1) GPS tracking hook handles both Transistorsoft direct format (location.latitude) and standard format (location.coords.latitude), 2) Distance calculation using Haversine formula verified, 3) GPS noise filtering (< 0.001 mi) and jump filtering (>= 5 mi) working correctly, 4) Employee login shows 'Find My Account' button, 5) Consignor login shows 'Find My Agreement' button, 6) Admin dashboard GPS Mileage Tracker displays summary tabs (Today/Month/Year), IRS rate ($0.725/mile), and trip history.

gps_location_format_handling.details: useGPSTracking.js correctly handles both Transistorsoft format (location.latitude directly) and standard format (location.coords.latitude) using 'const coords = location.coords || location'

distance_calculation.details: Haversine formula correctly calculates distance in miles. Test: Atlanta to Marietta = ~16.86 miles

gps_noise_filtering.details: Filters out movements < 0.001 miles (GPS noise) and >= 5 miles (GPS jumps)

employee_login_button_label.details: Button shows 'Find My Account' instead of 'Continue'

consignor_login_button_label.details: Button shows 'Find My Agreement' instead of 'Continue'

gps_tracker_summary_tabs.details: Today, Month (March), Year (2026) tabs visible with IRS rate $0.725/mile

trip_in_progress_display.details: Active trip shows Miles, Points, Deduction stats and duration

manual_trip_entry_api.details: POST /api/admin/gps-trips/manual creates trip with correct tax deduction calculation
